name: iptv-org · México
notes: Community-maintained playlist with all publicly available channels broadcasting from Mexico. Updated daily via GitHub Actions.

name: iptv-org · Español (idioma)
notes: All channels broadcasting in Spanish from any country (pan-Latin: MX, AR, CO, CL, PE, VE, etc.). Complements the MX country list with international Spanish-language cable channels.

name: CharlieII · IPTV México
notes: Manually curated list of Mexican channels from official sources (network websites, official YouTube streams). Focuses on open-air TV: Televisa, TV Azteca, Canal 11, Multimedios, Imagen, Milenio, Foro TV, Canal 22, etc.

name: CharlieII · IPTV México (Sitio 2)
notes: Alternate stream mirrors for the same Mexican channels, providing failover when primary sources go offline.

name: Free-TV · Mundo (filtrado ES)
notes: Global free-TV playlist (Free-TV/IPTV on GitHub). Filtered to Spanish-language entries only. Good source for pan-regional cable channels like CNN en Español, Discovery en Español, ESPN Deportes, and Disney Channel LatAm.

name: json-teles · México
notes: Community-driven directory focused on Spanish-language news, sports, kids, and music channels. Mexico-specific file generated automatically via GitHub Actions from a structured JSON database.

name: IPTV Player Stream
notes: Original source. Kept as supplementary fallback.
